name: Workers comp denied my neck injury saying not work-related, what now?
description: Appeal immediately with better medical proof.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp denied my neck injury saying not work-related, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal immediately with better medical proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal the denial within 20 days in Utah or 60 in Idaho to the Labor Commission or Industrial Commission.** Gather stronger medical evidence showing causation.[2] Key factors: Request hearing; submit new doctor reports; prove accident link. Deadlines strict; many wins on appeal with attorney. Don't sign releases; file promptly to preserve benefits.
